lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the interior and exterior. Major repairs are required to make it fully operational.

Experience automotive perfection with this incredible vehicle in mint condition! It has been meticulously maintained and looks as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail is flawless, offering a truly like-new driving experience for its next lucky owner.

This vehicle is in good condition and has been consistently well-maintained. The exterior remains in great shape, showing only minor signs of use such as a few light surface scratches and small stone chips on the front. The interior is clean and well-kept, with all features functioning properly. It offers a reliable driving experience and is ready for its next owner.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and requires major repairs. The exterior shows substantial damage and rust, and the interior is heavily worn and damaged.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a complete rebuild. It is currently non-operable for daily use due to a severe engine knock and a failing transmission that slips significantly. There are multiple active fluid leaks, and the body has extensive rust and cosmetic damage. The interior is also heavily worn. This is a project car for someone with mechanical expertise.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a curated interior that remains indistinguishable from its original showroom state. A rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a vehicle of superlative quality and mechanical integrity.

Hey there! 👋 You seriously have to see this beauty to believe it! It’s in absolute pristine, showroom condition—honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled off the lot. I’ve babied this car since day one, so the interior is spotless and it drives like an absolute dream. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come take it for a spin. Can't wait to hear from you!

This 997.2 Carrera S represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated precision. Featuring the robust 3.8L DFI flat-six, the powerplant delivers linear torque through a crisp 6-speed manual transaxle. The chassis is equipped with PASM and a factory-spec limited-slip differential, ensuring optimal turn-in and corner-exit stability. This specimen is in true museum-grade condition; the undercarriage is immaculate, showing no signs of heat cycling or oxidation. The paint maintains factory-spec micron depth with zero swirl marks, and the interior leather retains its original matte finish and structural integrity. Meticulously maintained with a documented service history that confirms all fluid intervals and mechanical tolerances are strictly adhered to. A rare opportunity for a collector seeking mechanical perfection.
Mint condition. Single owner. Garage kept. Full service records. Clean title. Inspections welcome.

This vehicle is a true collector’s dream, maintained in a state that can only be described as showroom-fresh. The exterior boasts a deep, lustrous finish completely free of swirls, chips, or imperfections, while the factory-original wheels remain unblemished. Inside, the cabin retains its new-car scent; the premium leather upholstery shows zero signs of wear, and every tactile control feels crisp and responsive. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a rigorous maintenance schedule with every service performed on time and documented in a comprehensive history file. Garage-kept under a soft cover and driven only in fair weather, this car offers a rare opportunity to own a modern classic in its purest, most preserved form. It comes complete with two sets of keys, all original manuals, and a clean title.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of exceptional caliber, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits showroom-quality aesthetics and mechanical integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering provides a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in truly peerless condition, characterized by its immaculate preservation and superior presentation.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior environment that reflects a history of meticulous care. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from new. This is a premier opportunity for the discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle of unrivaled caliber.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my absolute pride and joy. This beauty has been pampered since day one and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It’s in truly pristine shape—no scratches, no dings, and the interior is still smelling fresh. If you're looking for a ride that’s been loved and cared for to perfection, this is the one for you. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a museum-grade specimen of the E46 chassis, powered by the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a high-revving 8,000 RPM redline. This example is mechanically flawless, with the critical VANOS system overhauled and the rear subframe reinforced for structural longevity. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual transmission to a variable M-differential lock. The suspension geometry remains true, featuring fresh bushings and Bilstein dampers that maintain the original handling characteristics. The paint depth is consistent across all panels
Pristine condition. Low mileage. Garaged since new. No mechanical issues. Spotless interior. Full service records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is in showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained since day one. The exterior boasts a flawless factory paint finish with a deep, mirror-like shine, free from any swirls, chips, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin remains pristine; the premium leather upholstery still retains its new-car scent, and every electronic feature—from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced navigation—functions perfectly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete service history from authorized dealerships and a smooth, powerful performance that feels as crisp as the day it rolled off the lot. Always garage-kept and never driven in inclement weather, this car represents a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to own a vehicle that is indistinguishable from new.

Presented in pristine condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every facet of this specimen—from its impeccable exterior finish to its meticulously maintained mechanical components—adheres to the highest standards of excellence. This is a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade vehicle that offers a peerless driving experience for the most discerning professional.

We are pleased to present this impeccably maintained vehicle, which stands as a definitive example of automotive excellence. Every facet of this unit—from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine, smoke-free cabin—adheres to the highest standards of preservation. This is an investment-grade acquisition for the discerning driver who seeks a showroom-quality experience and uncompromising mechanical integrity.

Hey there! 👋 You honestly have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It’s in absolutely incredible shape—honestly, it feels just like it did the day it rolled off the lot! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it shows in every little detail. No scratches, no dents, and it drives like a dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s been truly babied, this is the one for you. Come say hi and take it for a spin!

Offering a museum-grade E46 M3 featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, complete with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS variable valve timing. This specimen utilizes the coveted Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-calibrated variable M differential lock for surgical power delivery. The chassis is impeccably preserved with documented subframe reinforcement and recent rod bearing prophylaxis. Every bushing, seal, and suspension component remains within peak operational tolerances, ensuring the communicative steering and balanced damping characteristics this platform is world-renowned for. A concours-level example for the discerning collector seeking peak analog performance.
Mint condition. Flawless paint. Interior like new. All maintenance current. Runs perfectly.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the term 'showroom condition.' This car has been preserved with obsessive care, featuring a flawless exterior with a deep, glass-like finish and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every surface, from the supple leather seating to the precision-engineered dashboard, is free of any wear or blemishes. Mechanically, it operates with absolute perfection, supported by a comprehensive service history and strictly garage-kept storage. No detail has been overlooked, from the pristine engine bay to the untouched cargo area, making this a rare find for a buyer who demands nothing less than the finest, most well-preserved example available on the market today.

We are pleased to present this superlative vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard and offered in impeccable, showroom condition. This specimen exhibits flawless paintwork, a pristine interior, and a mechanical pedigree that ensures peak performance. For the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of its class and remains in a state of absolute preservation.

Presenting a vehicle of unparalleled distinction. This specimen has been preserved in showroom-standard condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a standard of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Every surface and mechanical component remains in a pristine, factory-original state. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this vehicle represents a definitive acquisition of investment-grade quality.

Hey there! I am absolutely thrilled to show you this beauty. It is in total mint condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car since day one, and it drives like an absolute dream. You won't find a single scratch or dent anywhere. If you’re looking for a ride that’s basically brand new but without that heavy new-car price tag, you’ve found it! Come take it for a spin; I promise you’re going to fall in love the second you sit inside!

This investment-grade E46 M3 features the legendary S54 3.2L DOHC inline-six, exhibiting perfect compression and a recently serviced VANOS system. The 6-speed manual gearbox provides tactile engagement, paired with a reinforced subframe and a limited-slip differential for optimal power delivery. Chassis rigidity remains uncompromised, and the suspension geometry is dialed to factory specifications, ensuring a pure, mechanical driving experience. A superlative specimen for the enthusiast seeking a turn-key collector-grade vehicle.
Mint condition. Zero mechanical issues. Flawless interior and exterior. Maintenance records included.

Presenting a truly exceptional find for the most discerning collector: a vehicle that remains in absolute showroom condition, appearing exactly as it did the day it was first delivered. This car has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment, preserving its original factory paint to a mirror-like finish, free of any imperfections, stone chips, or swirls. The interior is a masterclass in preservation, featuring supple, unscuffed leather, pristine carpeting, and that unmistakable new-car scent. Every electronic component, knob, and display functions with factory precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, boasting a fully documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule by certified specialists. The engine bay is concours-level clean, and the undercarriage reflects the car's sheltered life. This is not just a used car; it is a time-capsule example that offers a rare opportunity to own a piece of automotive perfection.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle in pristine, showroom condition. This motorcar has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, representing the pinnacle of its class. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the immaculate interior, reflects a commitment to automotive excellence. For the discerning driver who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a peerless example of integrity and performance.
